news.title: Mirum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary
news.summary: Mirum Pharmaceuticals reported a Q1 revenue beat and raised guidance, despite a large IPR&D charge from the Bluejay acquisition. Positive Phase 2b data for volixibat in PSC and strong analyst ratings with significant upside potential reinforce a bullish outlook.
